ab: kiya i imug i yaki’ qu?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: kiya, kiya i maqilaap i qaqlapan i hiya’.
en: Yes, she’s sleeping in her room.

ab: kiya i imug i yaki’ qu?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: ukas, yani na’ matgi latanux la, asiki gabiyan ga ma’uwah imuwag.
ch: B:不在，她剛出去了，要晚上才回家。
en: No, she’s not. She just went out and will be back in the evening.

ab: kiya i imug i yutas qu?
en: Is grandfather at home?

ab: kiya i masnapusal tinantun na imuwag, usa’ kumiyum i riyatux isu’.
ch: B:他在二樓，你上去找他吧。
en: He’s upstairs. You can go up and find him.

ab: kiya a itaal imug qu?
en: Is anyone at home?

ab: aqu i Kagi’! ingasug su’ cubalay ini’ tali la, lawkah su’ qu?
ch: B:是Kagi' 啊，很久沒有看到你了，你好嗎?
en: It’s Kagi’. I haven’t seen you in a while! How have you been?

ab: balayq ga! wahan mi su’ i kumiyum maskakaru’.
en: I’m doing great! I came to chat with you.

ab: kiya inu’ i yaba’ su’?
en: Where is your father?

ab: kiya i gaghapuyan humalngag cu raramat, halay mi kumaal i hiya’.
ch: B:他在廚房炒菜，我去叫他。
en: He’s in the kitchen cooking. Let me go call him.

ab: aruwa inu’ i Bagan la?
en: Where did Bagan go?

ab: aruwa i libu’ na waylung rumakaap cu waylung i hiya’.
en: She went to the chicken coop to catch chickens.

ab: utas, awni cami la.
en: Grandfather, we’re here.

ab: ukas imuwag i yutas mamu, kiya i claq i hiya’, naga’ imuwag cimu i hiya’ han.
ch: B:你們的爺爺不在家，他在田裡，你們在家等他回來吧。
en: Your grandfather is not at home. He’s in the field. Wait for him to come back.

ab: mama’, uniyal su’ uwi la!
en: Uncle, you’re here!

ab: ingasug ta’ cubalay ini’ pakitaal la, ibabaweq su’ la yo!
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. You’ve grown taller.

ab: paqasun mu cubalay kinitaal isu’.
en: It’s so good to see you.

ab: binayq icimu ku pangran ka hani, asiki sukuun i pingsiyang.
ch: B:這是給你們的鳳梨，要放到冰箱裡。
en: Here’s a pineapple for you. Put it in the refrigerator.

ab: ingasug ini’ uwah la, kurunguun mi cimu kahabaag i maneq.
ch: A:這麼久沒來，我叫大家一起來吃飯。
en: It’s been a while. Let’s have a meal together.

ab: hanuan ga, hanuan kuwing asi nubuwag cu cha, maskakaruay ta’ i papaskakaruan.
ch: B:不用麻煩了，我喝茶就好，我們來客廳聊天。
en: No need to bother. I’ll just have tea. Let’s sit in the living room and chat.

ab: mausa’ kuwing i imug la, mahuway cubalay ku ginalayng su’!
ch: A:謝謝你的招待，我要回去了。
en: Thank you for your hospitality. I have to go now.

ab: yani na’ tinuting ku waylung ka hani, aras isu’ imuwag tihiyahiyaw i maneq.
ch: B:這隻雞剛殺好，你帶回去慢慢吃。
en: This chicken was just freshly killed. Take it home and enjoy it slowly.
